info.title: Document Intelligence API
info.description: SaaS Document Intelligence Platform with RAG, AI Extraction, and Multi-tenancy.

get.description: List all available user roles using raw SQL.

schema.title: Response Get Roles Api Users Roles Get

post.description: Register a new user within a tenant using raw SQL.
Handle Google OAuth Login/Registration using raw SQL.
Authenticate a user using raw SQL.

get.description: Retrieve current user profile.

schema.title: Response Get Documents Api Documents Get

post.description: Use AI to automatically detect the industry and category of a document.
Generate a new document or report based on a template and user input.
Perform multimodal analysis on a document (text + images).

get.description: Generate proactive suggestions or questions based on the document content.

post.description: Summarize a chat or document content.
Chat with a specific document using RAG.

get.description: List all supported industries and their associated categories with optional search.

schema.title: Response Get All Industries Api Industries Get

post.description: Create a new industry.

get.description: Retrieve a specific industry by ID.
Retrieve document templates associated with a specific industry.

schema.title: Response Get Templates By Industry Api Industries  Industry Id  Templates Get
Response Get Tenant Invoices Api Billing Invoices Get

get.description: List all available subscription plans.

schema.title: Response Get Plans Api Plans Get

post.description: Create a new subscription plan.

delete.description: Deactivate a subscription plan (sets is_active to FALSE).

post.description: Register a new SaaS tenant on the platform using raw SQL.

get.description: Retrieve comprehensive statistics for a tenant's dashboard using raw SQL.
Retrieve the configuration settings for a specific tenant using raw SQL.

put.description: Update the configuration settings for a specific tenant using raw SQL.

get.description: Retrieve metered usage logs for the current tenant with search and pagination.

schema.title: Response Get My Usage Logs Api Logs Usage Get

post.description: Log a new metered usage event.

get.description: Retrieve an aggregated summary of usage for the current billing period.

schema.title: Response Get Usage Summary Api Logs Usage Summary Get

get.description: Retrieve security and activity audit logs for the current tenant with search and pagination.

schema.title: Response Get My Audit Logs Api Logs Audit Get

post.description: Manually create a new audit log entry.

get.description: Retrieve comprehensive platform metrics using raw SQL.

schema.title: Response Get Failed Payments Api Admin Billing Failed Get
Response List All Tenants Api Admin Tenants Get

get.description: Retrieve all public document generation templates with search and pagination.

schema.title: Response Get Public Templates Api Templates Public  Get

get.description: Retrieve templates owned by the current tenant or public templates.

schema.title: Response Get My Templates Api Templates My  Get

post.description: AI Template Builder: Generates a complete professional template based on classification.

get.description: Retrieve reports generated for the current tenant.

schema.title: Response Get My Reports Api Reports Get

post.description: Analyze a document using a template and LLM.

get.description: Retrieve a specific report.
Retrieve all versions of a report.

schema.title: Response Get Report Versions Api Reports  Report Id  Versions Get

get.description: Retrieve notifications for the current user with status filters.

parameters.name: status

schema.description: Filter by status: all, read, unread
schema.title: Status

parameters.description: Filter by status: all, read, unread

schema.title: Response Get Notifications Api Notifications  Get

post.description: Mark a specific notification as read.
Mark all notifications as read for the current user.
Create a test notification for the current user.

get.description: Get a breakdown of current usage vs plan limits for the authenticated tenant.

schema.title: Response Get My Usage Summary Api Metering Summary Get

get.description: Get raw historical usage logs for the tenant with pagination.

schema.title: Response Get My Usage Logs Api Metering Logs Get

post.description: Manually record usage for a specific metric.

get.description: List all categories with pagination and search.

schema.title: Response List Categories Api Categories Get

post.description: Create a new document category within an industry.

get.description: Retrieve a specific category and its subcategories.
List all subcategories with pagination and search.

schema.title: Response List Subcategories Api Subcategories Get

post.description: Create a new document subcategory within a category.

get.description: Retrieve a specific subcategory.

Retrieve all roles applicable to the current tenant with pagination and search.
Includes both system-wide roles (tenant_id IS NULL) and tenant-specific custom roles.

schema.title: Response Get Tenant Roles Api Roles Get

post.description:
Create a new custom role specific to the current tenant.
Only accessible to tenant admins (e.g., enterprise_tenant).

patch.description:
Update a custom role for the current tenant.
System roles cannot be modified through this endpoint.

get.description: List folders for the current tenant.

schema.title: Response List Folders Api Folders Get

post.description: Create a new folder.

get.description: Retrieve a specific folder by ID.

delete.description: Delete a folder. Folder must be empty.
